Excellent! The renaming is complete. Here's a summary of all changes made to `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/metadata_helpers.py`:
## Changes Applied
Successfully renamed all occurrences of `plan_backend` to `pr_backend`:
1. **Function parameter** (line 26): `plan_backend: ManagedPrBackend` â†’ `pr_backend: ManagedPrBackend`
2. **Variable usage in `write_dispatch_metadata`** (line 44): `plan_backend.get_managed_pr(...)` â†’ `pr_backend.get_managed_pr(...)`
3. **Method calls in `write_dispatch_metadata`** (lines 48-49): - `plan_backend.ensure_plan_header(...)` â†’ `pr_backend.ensure_plan_header(...)` - `plan_backend.update_metadata(...)` â†’ `pr_backend.update_metadata(...)`
4. **Context attribute access in `maybe_update_plan_dispatch_metadata`** (line 85): `ctx.plan_backend.resolve_pr_number_for_branch(...)` â†’ `ctx.pr_backend.resolve_pr_number_for_branch(...)`
5. **Method calls in `maybe_update_plan_dispatch_metadata`** (lines 93-94): - `ctx.plan_backend.ensure_plan_header(...)` â†’ `ctx.pr_backend.ensure_plan_header(...)` - `ctx.plan_backend.update_metadata(...)` â†’ `ctx.pr_backend.update_metadata(...)`
No occurrences of `require_plan_backend` were found in this file. All external API field names and user-facing string messages were preserved as requested.
